title: AI in Healthcare: Three Deployments That Worked — Apr 13
summary: Today's press review covers major AI advances in healthcare, enterprise deployment, and energy efficiency. We highlight a new AI tool that predicts patient response to cancer drugs, Microsoft's VibeVoice for real-time speech synthesis, and a breakthrough in energy-aware LLM inference that cuts power use by up to 70%. These developments signal a shift toward practical, measurable AI impact across industries.
